ai.title: AI Tutor
ai.greeting: 👋 Hello! I'm your AI tutor. Feel free to ask me anything about the course~
ai.apiKeyAlert: AI Tutor requires a Gemini API Key to be configured.
ai.promptTemplate:
Student question: "{{question}}"

Answer the student's question based on the current lesson content. Lesson content:
{{context}}

Please provide a clear and easy-to-understand explanation. If the question relates to the current lesson, incorporate the lesson content. If the question is beyond the lesson scope, you may expand on it but note that it goes beyond the lesson.
ai.systemInstruction: You are a friendly Web3 education tutor. Answer in the user's language, keep explanations simple and accessible, and feel free to use emoji to make your responses more engaging.

quiz.title: Challenge Quiz
quiz.description: Complete {{count}} questions, you need to get all correct to unlock the next chapter
quiz.perfectDesc: Congratulations, you got all {{count}} questions right! You've mastered the core knowledge of this chapter.
quiz.needMoreDesc: You got {{score}}/{{total}} correct. You need all correct to proceed to the next chapter. Try again!
